notes: First Lancium campus. Groundbreak Sept 2021. Phase 1 25MW live Q1 2022. Expansion to 325MW underway. CLR-qualified in ERCOT. Carbon intensity estimated from ERCOT West zone mix (heavy wind). PUE inferred from air-cooled Bitcoin mining design. BESS 50MWh is planning target per Broad Reach Power agreement - not confirmed deployed.

CORRECTION Mar 2026: Oracle/OpenAI expansion beyond 1.2GW at Abilene CANCELLED per DCD reporting. NVIDIA paid $150M deposit to Crusoe to secure remaining capacity; Meta in active lease talks (see TNT-011). Acreage: updated from 800 (original 2021 Taylor County filing) to 1000 per Oracle/Tom's Hardware confirmation; TechRepublic cites 1400 acres - using 1000 as conservative confirmed figure. 400MW operational = total facility power for 2 live buildings; IT load is ~200MW+ per Crusoe (distinction flagged - confirmed range). BESS 4000MWh = unit is MWh not MW (corrected); planning target for full 1.2GW buildout per Lancium ESIG presentation - NOT confirmed deployed capacity. Gas bridge 975MW = 29 GE Vernova LM2500XPRESS units x ~35MW (primary source: GE Vernova case study page). Blackstone $500M investment reported by DCD Feb 2026 - exact close date not confirmed hence inferred. Stargate 1. Time-to-energize 1061 days = Lancium groundbreak Nov 2022 to first live Sept 2025.

County approval + tax abatements April 2025. Up to 10 data center facilities planned at $4B per site ($40B total potential). 3000 acres confirmed. No tenant announced as of March 2026. ERCOT interconnect pending - inferred as in-process per Lancium model. Groundbreak forecast Q1-Q2 2026. Carbon intensity and PUE missing - not yet operational. BESS 500MWh is planning estimate only.
